organization.mission: Operate the Nexus ecosystem with major-tech execution discipline and full delivery visibility.

levels.purpose: Sets quarterly objectives, investment priorities, and risk appetite.
Owns cross-app architecture, standards, and bounded-context interfaces.
Owns roadmap sequencing, dependency ordering, and release readiness.
Controls implementation quality, technical decomposition, and review gates.
Implements, validates, and documents deliverables with role specialization.

chief-architect.description: Maintains ecosystem architecture map, boundaries, and integration contracts.

program-manager.description: Keeps execution order deterministic and dependencies unblocked.

engineering-lead.description: Owns technical quality gates and implementation review control.

planner.description: Decomposes goals into prerequisite-aware task plans and validates execution order.

backend.description: Implements service/runtime behavior and contract-compatible APIs.

devops.description: Owns infra workflows, deployment consistency, and environment determinism.

qa.description: Runs cross-service tests, validates acceptance criteria, and blocks regressions.

docs.description: Maintains architecture/decision context and updates generated documentation artifacts.

pre-merge.description: Required validations before integrating feature work into mainline.
